series.title: [PATCH] gdbstub: Update x86 control register bits

review.summary: The series updates CR4 flag XMLs usefully, but it introduces a duplicated `PKE` field in the 32-bit target description. That creates an invalid/ambiguous register flag mapping and needs to be fixed before merge.

stages.A: Patch intent is correct: refresh x86 CR4 bit annotations used by the gdbstub XML descriptions.
stages.B: Static diff review found one functional issue in the 32-bit CR4 flag table.
stages.C: Consistency check across 32-bit and 64-bit XMLs shows the new bits largely align, aside from the duplicated 32-bit entry.
stages.D: Reported build/configure status does not exercise gdb XML semantic correctness, so the defect can pass CI.
stages.E: Recommendation: reject as-is and respin after removing the duplicate field entry.

findings.title: Duplicate `PKE` CR4 field entry in 32-bit XML
findings.description: The updated `i386_cr4` flags table defines `PKE` twice for bit 22. GDB target descriptions expect unique flag names/bit mappings; duplicating the same field makes the XML description internally inconsistent and can lead to ambiguous or rejected flag decoding.
findings.suggestion: Remove the duplicated `PKE` line so bit 22 is described exactly once in `i386_cr4`.
findings.confidence_reason: The duplicate is explicit in the patch hunk and represents the same field name and bit range repeated consecutively.

diff:
From git@z Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
Subject: [PATCH] gdbstub: Update x86 control register bits
From: Mathias Krause <minipli@grsecurity.net>
Date: Fri, 27 Mar 2026 15:34:13 +0100
Message-Id: <20260327143413.254227-1-minipli@grsecurity.net>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset="utf-8"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

The control register bits haven't been updated in a few years, making
them lack behind features QEMU ganied in these years.

Update them to the current version of the SDM and sort the 32bit version
to be in line with all the other definitions (descending order).

This should remove confusion when debugging, for example, CET-enabled
guests:

- before the change:
  (gdb) info registers cr4
  cr4            0x8000f0            [ PGE MCE PAE PSE ]

- after the change:
  (gdb) info registers cr4
  cr4            0x8000f0            [ CET PGE MCE PAE PSE ]

Signed-off-by: Mathias Krause <minipli@grsecurity.net>
---
 gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-32bit.xml | 47 +++++++++++++++++++---------------
 gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-64bit.xml |  7 +++++
 2 files changed, 34 insertions(+), 20 deletions(-)

diff --git a/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-32bit.xml b/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-32bit.xml
index 7a66a02b67e3..1dec40e1d2c1 100644
--- a/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-32bit.xml
+++ b/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-32bit.xml
@@ -87,27 +87,34 @@
   </flags>
 
   <flags id="i386_cr4" size="4">
-	<field name="VME" start="0" end="0"/>
-	<field name="PVI" start="1" end="1"/>
-	<field name="TSD" start="2" end="2"/>
-	<field name="DE" start="3" end="3"/>
-	<field name="PSE" start="4" end="4"/>
-	<field name="PAE" start="5" end="5"/>
-	<field name="MCE" start="6" end="6"/>
-	<field name="PGE" start="7" end="7"/>
-	<field name="PCE" start="8" end="8"/>
-	<field name="OSFXSR" start="9" end="9"/>
-	<field name="OSXMMEXCPT" start="10" end="10"/>
-	<field name="UMIP" start="11" end="11"/>
-	<field name="LA57" start="12" end="12"/>
-	<field name="VMXE" start="13" end="13"/>
-	<field name="SMXE" start="14" end="14"/>
-	<field name="FSGSBASE" start="16" end="16"/>
-	<field name="PCIDE" start="17" end="17"/>
-	<field name="OSXSAVE" start="18" end="18"/>
-	<field name="SMEP" start="20" end="20"/>
+	<field name="LAM_SUP" start="28" end="28"/>
+	<field name="LASS" start="27" end="27"/>
+	<field name="UINTR" start="25" end="25"/>
+	<field name="PKS" start="24" end="24"/>
+	<field name="CET" start="23" end="23"/>
+	<field name="PKE" start="22" end="22"/>
+	<field name="PKE" start="22" end="22"/>
 	<field name="SMAP" start="21" end="21"/>
-	<field name="PKE" start="22" end="22"/>
+	<field name="SMEP" start="20" end="20"/>
+	<field name="KL" start="19" end="19"/>
+	<field name="OSXSAVE" start="18" end="18"/>
+	<field name="PCIDE" start="17" end="17"/>
+	<field name="FSGSBASE" start="16" end="16"/>
+	<field name="SMXE" start="14" end="14"/>
+	<field name="VMXE" start="13" end="13"/>
+	<field name="LA57" start="12" end="12"/>
+	<field name="UMIP" start="11" end="11"/>
+	<field name="OSXMMEXCPT" start="10" end="10"/>
+	<field name="OSFXSR" start="9" end="9"/>
+	<field name="PCE" start="8" end="8"/>
+	<field name="PGE" start="7" end="7"/>
+	<field name="MCE" start="6" end="6"/>
+	<field name="PAE" start="5" end="5"/>
+	<field name="PSE" start="4" end="4"/>
+	<field name="DE" start="3" end="3"/>
+	<field name="TSD" start="2" end="2"/>
+	<field name="PVI" start="1" end="1"/>
+	<field name="VME" start="0" end="0"/>
   </flags>
 
   <flags id="i386_efer" size="4">
diff --git a/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-64bit.xml b/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-64bit.xml
index 6d889692114d..9ac9164e6a99 100644
--- a/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-64bit.xml
+++ b/gdbstub/gdb-xml/i386-64bit.xml
@@ -102,9 +102,16 @@
   </flags>
 
   <flags id="x64_cr4" size="8">
+	<field name="FRED" start="32" end="32"/>
+	<field name="LAM_SUP" start="28" end="28"/>
+	<field name="LASS" start="27" end="27"/>
+	<field name="UINTR" start="25" end="25"/>
+	<field name="PKS" start="24" end="24"/>
+	<field name="CET" start="23" end="23"/>
 	<field name="PKE" start="22" end="22"/>
 	<field name="SMAP" start="21" end="21"/>
 	<field name="SMEP" start="20" end="20"/>
+	<field name="KL" start="19" end="19"/>
 	<field name="OSXSAVE" start="18" end="18"/>
 	<field name="PCIDE" start="17" end="17"/>
 	<field name="FSGSBASE" start="16" end="16"/>
-- 
2.53.0
